channel.title: XKey Updates
channel.description: XKey - Vietnamese Input Method for macOS

item.title: Version 1.2.22 (Build 20260525)
item.description:
What's New

feat(i18n): full vi/en/zh-Hans coverage + macro case-handling fixes

i18n follow-up to PR #275:

  • Wire appLanguage into SharedSettings load/save so it persists in the

App Group plist and survives export/import (previously stored only in

the standalone UserDefaults cache).

  • Default first-launch language to Vietnamese (.vi) instead of .system

so new users see the Vietnamese UI regardless of macOS locale.

  • Fix MenuBarIconStyle.displayName double-lookup: return raw vi key and

let the UI wrap with LocalizedStringKey for a single catalog lookup.

  • Harden AppearanceSection.restartApp(): use executableURL, pass the

bundle path via argv $1 (safe for paths with quotes/$), surface launch

failures via NSLog and skip exit(0) on failure.

  • Localize previously-hardcoded strings in HotkeyRecorderView and

AdvancedSection (Text(ternary), .help, .alert title, downloadError,

user-dictionary alert messages).

  • Strengthen AppLanguageTests: use a sentinel AppleLanguages override

so removal can be verified without relying on NSGlobalDomain fallback;

add invalid-value and missing-key coverage.

  • Localizable.xcstrings: complete en and zh-Hans translations for every

catalog key (535/535 = 100% both languages); replace stale RDP

description key whose Vietnamese source had drifted from the catalog.

Macro engine:

  • All-caps detection now ignores non-letter characters so triggers like

"XR-EV" or "XREV1" remain all-caps (digits/punct are neutral).

  • First-letter-uppercase triggers produce Title Case output: capitalize

the first letter of each whitespace-separated word in the result.

  • Add MacroManagerTests covering trigger case-sensitivity and auto-caps

output behavior.

Release:

  • Bump MARKETINGVERSION to 1.2.22 (CURRENTPROJECT_VERSION 20260525).

Tests: 416 passed, 1 network-dependent translation test flaked

(unrelated to this change).

Xem chi tiết trên GitHub
